emails.subject: Burlington Guaranty
emails.body: Burlington Guaranty Attached is the Burlington guaranty with my comments. I was unable to redline the doc. Computer problems. I am forwarding the clean version. Hopefully Burlington can redline against the draft they sent.

emails.subject: FW: Burlington Guaranty
emails.body: Gerald, could you kindly take a quick look over this so that I can return it for execution. Thanks Rudwell 53596.

emails.subject: RE: Burlington Guaranty
emails.body: I am fine with this form.
